mnemonics.title: PATH Order Matters
mnemonics.content: Left Comes First - Like Command Finding: The leftmost directory in PATH is searched first for commands.

mnemonics.title: HOME Sweet HOME
mnemonics.content: Home Is Where Your Files Are: HOME variable points to your personal directory where your files reside.

mnemonics.title: PATH Separator
mnemonics.content: Colons Connect Paths: PATH uses colons (:) to separate multiple directory paths.
